featureName: BUG-024-002: Reconcile artifact drift to current gate standards (Check 5A / G022 / G053 / G060 TDD / Check 8A regression / Check 8B shared-infra / artifact-freshness / Check 17) + close real §22.7 connector-inventory drift (15 → 16, QF Decisions)

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created the BUG-024-002 8-artifact packet for 32 state-transition-guard BLOCKS + 19 artifact-freshness sub-failures + 1 real §22.7 connector-inventory drift surfaced by sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 29 (mode: reconcile-to-doc) reconcile probe on spec 024. Findings categorized into 9 gate buckets: Gate G060 scenario-first TDD markers missing, Check 5A SLA-substring false-positive needing Stress row, Gate G022 specialist completeness missing regression/simplify/stabilize/security/bootstrap, Gate G022 strict-provenance impersonation for plan/analyze/audit/chaos/docs/validate/test/design, Check 8A regression E2E planning missing on both scopes, Check 8B shared-infrastructure planning missing on Scope 2 (§22 product-truth), artifact-freshness substring trigger on 'Superseded' word in spec.md heading + design.md bash comments cascading 19 sub-failures, Gate G053 missing Code Diff Evidence section, Check 17 missing structured spec(024)/bubbles(024/...) commit prefix. Real drift: spec 041 added internal/connector/qfdecisions/ on 2026-05-22 (commits 39ca4fcb/c22151a5/43ce5096) but docs/smackerel.md §22.7 + §24-A still claim 15 connectors with QF Decisions invisible. Confirmed BUG-024-001 (dod-scenario-fidelity-gap) is unrelated; BUG-024-002 is the second bug. Parent spec 024 stays status: done; no runtime path is changed.

Confirmed real-vs-doc drift via codebase inspection: find internal/connector -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d returns 16 directories including qfdecisions/; cmd/core/connectors.go lines 28-58 register qfDecisionsConn at line 51 and slice-append it at line 55. grep -cE 'qfdecisions|QF Decisions' docs/smackerel.md returns 0. Spec 041 status confirmed done_with_concerns and owns the connector implementation + boundary semantics. R-006 contract owned by spec 024 ('All connector lists in the document must account for the implemented connectors') is silently violated. Scope decision: single Scope 1 (artifact-only + 1 real doc edit) sized as one reconcile-to-doc fastlane closure because all 32 BLOCKs + 19 sub-failures + 1 drift map to coordinated mechanical fixes in coordinated files.

Security posture preserved. Zero secret, credential, token, or auth path touched. gitleaks pre-commit hook ran on the staging set; all PII (linux-home-username-leak) was redacted to ~/ in every evidence block before staging (zero /home/<user>/ paths in committed files). The QF Companion Boundary (Principle 10, NON-NEGOTIABLE) is reinforced by §22.7 row 16's verbatim boundary text: 'QF DecisionPacket ingestion as read-only companion (spec 041 — boundary: no financial advice generation)'. This packet adds no new attack surface and preserves the cross-product safety invariant that spec 041 owns.
